news.headline: Iran threatens key infrastructure in Middle East after Trump ultimatum
news.summary: Iran threatened on Sunday to attack key infrastructure across the Middle East if US President Donald Trump follows through on his vow to "obliterate" the Islamic republic's power plants unless the Strait of Hormuz swiftly reopens. news.headline: ‘iPhone City’ veteran tapped as party boss of China’s Silicon Valley
news.summary:
China’s southern tech hub of Shenzhen has a new Communist Party chief, nearly six months after the city’s former party boss was promoted to provincial governor.

news.headline: Hong Kong vows to boost green finance and innovation role for sustainable growth
news.summary:
Hong Kong’s finance chief has pledged to support the regional and global transition to a green economy by leveraging the city’s role as an international financial centre and a developing innovation and technology hub.

news.headline: Aftermath of Iranian missile strikes near Israel’s nuclear facility
news.summary: It was the first time Iranian missiles had penetrated Israeli air defence systems in the area around a key nuclear site.

news.headline: Lebanese nurse refuses to leave her post at hospital despite losses
news.summary: Lebanese nurse remains at her post in the Bekaa Valley after losing her fiance in the 2024 Israel-Hezbollah war.
